blogs.title: India AI Summit 2026 Day 4 LIVE
blogs.description: Mukesh Ambani says Jio with Reliance will invest ₹10 lakh crore over seven years; Sam Altman hails India as global AI leader, predicts 'new and better'

blogs.title: Supreme Court hearing on petitions against CAA
blogs.description: A Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant heard petitions challenging the constitutional validity of the Citizenship Amendment Act, 2019
